parameters.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM oms.sync_progress WHERE company_code = current_setting('app.company_code') AND doc_type = 'SO' AND status IN ('pending', 'running')
SELECT MAX(sap_update_date)::text AS anchor_date FROM oms.orders WHERE company_code = current_setting('app.company_code') AND doc_type = 'SO'
